claim: Build a local knowledge base in Claude Code by asking it to create a project summary in markdown, then update it after each working session by saying 'Update what we just did to my project'
actionable: Create a project.md file in your codebase and ask Claude Code to maintain it as a persistent knowledge base, updating after each session.
source_title: Claude Code Workflows That Will 10x Your Productivity

claim: Use Claude Code skills for repeated workflows: do the task manually once with Claude step-by-step, then say 'turn what we did into a skill'
actionable: Identify repetitive workflows in your coding sessions and convert them to reusable skills by manually walking through once then using the skill creation command.
source_title: Claude Code Workflows That Will 10x Your Productivity

claim: Context beats prompting for automation; spend effort organizing a fresh, condensed knowledge base rather than perfecting prompt wording
actionable: When building AI workflows, prioritize curating and structuring high-quality context over iterating on prompt language.
source_title: Claude Code Workflows That Will 10x Your Productivity

claim: Use Claude Code for PR splitting by setting a consistent ordering rule (interfaces first, integrations, helper methods, tests) and training it on your preferences
actionable: Document your preferred diff-splitting strategy and teach Claude Code this pattern via a skill to automate PR organization.
source_title: Claude Code Workflows That Will 10x Your Productivity

claim: Use Claude Code for on-call investigations by asking it to analyze all diffs in the release branch and suggest root causes based on SEV description
actionable: Create a skill that parses release branch history and generates prioritized hypotheses for what broke, accelerating incident response.
source_title: Claude Code Workflows That Will 10x Your Productivity
